description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat, slightly gabled roof. The front facade is characterized by a central entryway flanked by horizontal windows and two projecting side sections. The rear of the house boasts large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious balcony with a metal railing, providing ample natural light and outdoor living space. The side elevations reveal a mix of solid wall sections and vertical window slits, as well as a visible chimney and downspout. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of smooth wall surfaces and glass elements. The overall structure suggests a contemporary urban residence designed for both privacy and openness.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat gabled roof, large rear windows, and a spacious balcony. The exterior features clean lines, neutral colors, and a mix of glass and solid wall surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, horizontal windows, and projecting side sections.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the vertical window slit, chimney, and partial balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displays expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, sliding doors, and a large balcony with railing.
description_view_3: Right side view features another vertical window slit, downspout, and the continuation of the balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rear picture windows and horizontal front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entry with a single door, small overhang, and steps leading up to the entrance
